sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113269" key="xamai/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαί-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, -πουν, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ποδος,</foreign> <sense id="n113269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">going on foot,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.195</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
